bgmSettingKey.description: This key must be the same as in the default_save_data.json

sfxSettingKey.description: Leave this empty if there is only one setting for all sounds

disableInPool.title: Disable In Pool
disableInPool.description: If the object is in the pool, it is disabled.

parentlessInPool.title: Parentless In Pool
parentlessInPool.description: If the object is in the pool, it has no parent

parentEntity.title: Parent
parentEntity.description: The parent which the object is added to. Default is the objectPool

id.description: This is an unique id, which is used to get the correct notification badge.

textEntity.description: Optional: A text entity in the notification badge that needs to be changed.

disableOnClick.description: If true, this notification badge will be disabled automatically when clicked on the button. It can also be disabled with the function "disable"

disableContextMenu.description: Disable the context menu usually activated with right-click.
disableContextMenu.title: Disable Context Menu

delay.title: Delay
delay.description: Time till the dimension of the viewport is recalculated.

hasRewardedAd.title: Has Rewarded Ad
hasRewardedAd.description: You can change this value for testing purposes. This will not affect the real famobi API

templateName.title: Template Name
templateName.description: This value is used for saving in the localStorage. Make sure to make it unique, so it doesn't override any other storages.
